title: Senior Software Engineer (FIREx)
description:
FIREx-Future Internet Resilience Exchange

FIREx is a national-level initiative developing a decentralized, market-based platform for DDoS mitigation. The system integrates smart contracts and computing infrastructure to support more resilient and transparent cyber-defense infrastructure.

About This Role:

We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to support the development of FIREx’s backend systems, smart-contract components, and integrations with partner computing infrastructures. The role involves contributing to secure, reliable, and scalable system modules within a multi-institution research and industry consortium.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain backend services for commercial applications.
  • Contribute to smart-contract development (e.g., token standards, marketplace logic).
  • Support integration with partner APIs.
  • Participate in system design, testing, and documentation.
  • Collaborate with research teams and industry partners.

Job Requirements:

  • Industrial PhD, PhD or MSc in a relevant field (e.g., Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Distributed Systems, Networking, or Applied Cryptography) is advantageous but not required.
  • Candidates may bring strengths in any of the following areas:
  1. Backend development (Go, Java, Rust, TypeScript/Node.js, or similar).
  2. Blockchain or distributed-system concepts.
  3. API design, system integration, or secure software practices.
  4. Networking familiarity (e.g., routing basics, anycast, BGP) is helpful but not required.
  • Applicants with strong engineering fundamentals and clear communication are encouraged to apply, even if not experienced in all listed areas.


Interested candidates should submit their resume/CV together with a cover letter outlining their qualifications and relevant experience for the position.

Applications will be considered until the corresponding position has been filled. Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
About Illinois Advanced Research Center at Singapore Ltd.:

Illinois Advanced Research Center at Singapore Ltd. (Illinois ARCS) is a Singapore company affiliated with the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (Illinois) in the USA.  Established in 2009 for the purpose of conducting impactful research, Illinois ARCS operates today in partnership with the National Research Foundation (NRF) and a myriad of additional sponsors, universities and collaborators both in and outside Singapore. Illinois ARCS directly interfaces with Illinois for its research program leadership and many of its business support functions.
Illinois ARCS is an interdisciplinary research center focusing on breakthrough innovations with current core programs focusing on interactive cyber-infrastructures and fermentation-based food production.  Strategically planned expansion of the portfolio is anticipated with a corresponding growth in personnel. Illinois ARCS’s research mission is carried out through programs and projects that facilitate interactions among Illinois researchers, local researchers, and industry partners.

Illinois ARCS is situated in NRF’s Campus for Research Excellence and Technological Enterprise (CREATE) on the campus of the National University of Singapore (NUS), along with several other research centers established by top universities in the world.

Current research activities of Illinois ARCS take place within a major core program sponsored by NRF CREATE coupled with several additional research projects that receive funding from various sources, including the corporate sector. For more information, please visit Illinois ARCS website:  Home | Illinois Advanced Research Center at Singapore (Illinois ARCS) | Illinois
postedCompany.name: ILLINOIS ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTER AT SINGAPORE LTD.
